dj_text: That was Jolene (Bardcore | Medieval Style). Now let's pretend we're in a coffee shop with Bad Romance (Bardcore | Medieval Style Cover).
commercial_text: You've been listening for a while now. Your family misses you. Just kidding, they're also listening.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: Bad Romance (Bardcore | Medieval Style Cover)
